remarks: Modern craftsmanship meets contemporary design in this beautifully updated home nestled in the heart of Cranbury. Fully refreshed and move-in ready, this home offers the perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality. Step into the open foyer and spacious sun-filled layout featuring a stunning modern eat-in kitchen with sleek cabinetry, quartz countertops, farmhouse sink, tastefully tiled backsplash, and a large center island with seating. The premium stainless steel LG Studio smart appliance package adds both style and convenience. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the airy great room with vaulted ceilings, exposed beams, abundant natural light, and a beautiful fireplace with reclaimed wood mantel - an ideal space for everyday living and entertaining. A first-floor laundry room complete the main level.  Upstairs offers three generously sized bedrooms and an updated full bath, while the lower level provides flexible space perfect for guests, a home office, playroom, or additional bedroom. A garage and full attic offer excellent storage and workspace. Additional upgrades include central air, modern hardware and lighting, Bluetooth wireless features, and fresh paint throughout. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, parks, and major highways, this exceptional home combines modern comfort with timeless charm in one of Cranbury's most desirable settings
